architecture-beta
  group edge(cloud)[Edge]
  group app(server)[Application]
  service api(server)[Public API] in app
  junction bus in app
  service db(database)[Primary DB]
  api:R --> L:db
  api:B -[async fan-out]-> T:bus
---
+----------------------------+
| (cloud) Edge               |
|----------------------------|
+----------------------------+

+----------------------------+
| (server) Application       |
|----------------------------|
  [server] Public API
  (*) bus
+----------------------------+

[database] Primary DB

  Public API:R ---> L:Primary DB
  Public API:B --[async fan-out]-> T:bus
